title: Brevo vs Constant Contact (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare Brevo and Constant Contact: pricing, features, and ratings to find the best email marketing tool for your needs.
h1: Brevo vs Constant Contact: Detailed Comparison
intro: Both Brevo and Constant Contact are established email marketing platforms, but they serve different business needs. Brevo offers a comprehensive all-in-one CRM suite with a generous free tier, while Constant Contact focuses on simplicity for nonprofits and local businesses with paid plans starting at just $12/month. This comparison will help you determine which platform best fits your marketing requirements.

comparison_table.tool_a: Email, SMS, WhatsApp, Live Chat, CRM

choose_a_if: You want to start with a free plan supporting up to 100,000 subscribers with no credit card required
You need multi-channel marketing capabilities including SMS, WhatsApp, and live chat integrated in one platform
You require a transactional email API for sending automated, triggered emails from your application
choose_b_if: You prioritize built-in e-commerce features and social media advertising tools for local businesses
You prefer a simpler, more straightforward interface focused specifically on email marketing
You need event management capabilities for nonprofits or community organizations

faq.q: Is Brevo better than Constant Contact?
faq.a: Brevo offers more features and a more generous free tier, making it better for businesses wanting all-in-one marketing automation. However, Constant Contact may be preferable if you specifically need e-commerce integration and social media advertising. The best choice depends on your specific business requirements and budget.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Brevo or Constant Contact?
faq.a: Brevo is significantly cheaper because it offers a free plan supporting up to 100,000 subscribers with full access to core features. Constant Contact has no free tier and charges $12/month minimum. If you need paid features, Brevo starts at $25/month, making it the more affordable option overall.

faq.q: Can I switch from Constant Contact to Brevo?
faq.a: Yes, you can switch from Constant Contact to Brevo. Most email marketing platforms allow you to export your contact lists in standard formats like CSV. Both Brevo and Constant Contact support importing contacts, making migration straightforward. You may need to recreate automation workflows and templates in your new platform.
